title: guettarda andamanica
intro: Guettarda andamanica, also known as Andaman guettarda, is a plant species belonging to the Rubiaceae family, native to the Andaman and Nicobar Islands in the Bay of Bengal. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Guettarda andamanica include its potential to alleviate fever, reduce inflammation, and protect against infections, as well as its ability to act as an antioxidant and anti-cancer agent. Guettarda andamanica can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including extracts, infusions, and decoctions, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
